_meta._note: Live About page has no hero subtitle, no 'Mission' section (only 'Our Vision' which is mapped to mission), and no Values / 'What we stand for' section.

hero.title: ABOUT US
hero.subtitle: We're an early intervention team in Shah Alam, working alongside families since 2005.

mission.heading: Our vision
mission.body: Urbane Ethos Early Intervention Center provides individualized early intervention for language and speech disorders, developmental disorders and for learning disabilities. We provide one-to-one therapy sessions, and group sessions, parent consultations and trainings along with school screening programs. Our programs are personalized or specially catered to fit the child's abilities, goals, and interests.

story.heading: Our story
story.body: 20 years of experience in providing client-centered therapy and early intervention in learning, speech, occupational therapy, physiotherapy and now clinical psychology in individual and group sessions. Urbane Ethos Early Intervention Center started up the first multi-displinary center in 2005 based in Shah Alam and has since aided children, adolescents and parents in achieving developmental milestones and overcoming their disability or disorder to achieve a greater quality of life.

items.title: Listening first
items.body: Before we recommend anything, we sit with you and ask about your child. The story you bring matters more than any form.

items.title: Child-led pace
items.body: Progress is not a race. We follow what your child is ready for, and adjust the plan when the child tells us to.

items.title: Family in the room
items.body: Parents and caregivers are part of every session, not waiting outside. We share what we see and learn from what you see at home.

items.title: Evidence-grounded
items.body: Our team trains continuously and draws on current research. We say 'we don't know yet' when that's the honest answer.
